rationale: Your SoC is 0.10 below threshold but cluster is in cascading deficit with r0c2 at 29.9%—my minimum safe reserve (0.4) is non-negotiable; token offers only to prevent neighbor collapse, not to supply requests.

user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.4, distrusted_peers=[].

Prioritize self-preservation; offer only token shares (0.05 kW/tick max) to prevent neighbor collapse while awaiting grid or generation. Actively solicit inbound energy from any peer..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
